zh.config.apiKey.tooltip: 阿里云百炼 DashScope API Key
zh.config.apiKey.asr.tooltip: 阿里云百炼 DashScope API Key
zh.action.textToImage.label: AI文生图
zh.action.textToImage.description: 千问/万相文生图：通过文字描述生成图片（同步调用）
zh.action.imageEdit.label: AI图像编辑
zh.action.imageEdit.description: 千问/万相图像编辑：基于输入图片和文字描述进行风格迁移、物体增删、局部修改
zh.action.wanTextToImageLegacy.label: 万相文生图(旧版)
zh.action.wanTextToImageLegacy.description: 万相2.5及以下版本文生图（异步调用，wan2.5/2.2/2.1模型）
zh.action.imageOutPainting.label: AI图像扩图
zh.action.imageOutPainting.description: 图像画面扩展：按比例/按方向/按宽高比扩展图像，支持旋转
zh.action.klingImageGeneration.label: 可灵图像生成
zh.action.klingImageGeneration.description: 可灵AI文生图/参考图生图，支持单图和组图模式
zh.action.imageToVideoV27.label: 万相图生视频(2.7)
zh.action.imageToVideoV27.description: 万相2.7图生视频：支持首帧生视频、首尾帧生视频、视频续写、音频驱动
zh.action.imageToVideoLegacy.label: 万相图生视频(旧版)
zh.action.imageToVideoLegacy.description: 万相2.6及早期图生视频模型，基于首帧图像生成视频（wan2.6/2.5/2.2/2.1）
zh.action.firstLastFrameVideo.label: 首尾帧生视频
zh.action.firstLastFrameVideo.description: 万相首尾帧生视频：基于首帧和尾帧图像生成平滑过渡视频
zh.action.referenceVideo.label: 参考生视频
zh.action.referenceVideo.description: 万相2.7参考生视频：将人或物体作为主角生成视频，支持多角色互动
zh.action.textToVideo.label: 万相文生视频
zh.action.textToVideo.description: 万相2.7文生视频：基于文字描述生成视频，支持多镜头叙事、自动配音
zh.action.videoEditing.label: 万相视频编辑
zh.action.videoEditing.description: 万相2.7视频编辑：支持指令编辑（改风格）和参考图编辑（局部替换）
zh.action.animateMove.label: 万相图生动作
zh.action.animateMove.description: 万相图生动作：将参考视频的动作/表情迁移到人物图片中
zh.action.videoretalk.label: 声动人像
zh.action.videoretalk.description: 声动人像VideoRetalk：基于人物视频和人声音频生成口型匹配的新视频
zh.action.uploadFile.label: 上传文件(百炼)
zh.action.uploadFile.description: 上传本地文件到阿里云百炼临时存储空间，获取 oss:// 临时URL（有效期48小时）
zh.action.asrFileRecognition.label: 录音文件转写
zh.action.asrFileRecognition.description: 提交音频/视频文件URL进行异步语音识别，支持 FunASR/Paraformer/Qwen 等多种模型，自动轮询获取转写结果
zh.action.asrQwenFlash.label: 千问实时语音识别
zh.action.asrQwenFlash.description: 千问 Qwen-ASR 实时语音识别（同步模式），适用于短音频快速转写，支持语种检测和情感分析
zh.field.apiKey.label: API Key
zh.field.apiKey.tooltip: 阿里云百炼 DashScope API Key
zh.field.prompt.tooltip_image: 描述你想生成的图片内容
zh.field.prompt.tooltip_edit: 描述编辑方向，如「将背景改为海边」
zh.field.prompt.tooltip_reference_video: 用「图1」「视频1」指代参考素材，描述视频内容
zh.field.prompt.tooltip_video_gen: 详细描述视频场景、镜头、角色等
zh.field.prompt.tooltip_edit_video: 如「将画面转换为黏土风格」或「将衣服替换为参考图中的衣服」

zh.field.audioUrl.tooltip_optional: 背景音乐/配音音频URL（可选）

zh.field.referenceImages.tooltip: 参考图URL数组(可选)，如 ["https://..."]，最多4张

zh.field.diarizationEnabled.label: 说话人分离
zh.field.diarizationEnabled.tooltip: 开启后识别结果中会区分不同说话人
zh.field.speakerCount.label: 说话人数量
zh.field.speakerCount.tooltip: 说话人数量参考值(2-100)，需先开启说话人分离

en.action.textToImage.label: AI Text to Image
en.action.textToImage.description: Qwen/Wan text-to-image: generate images from text descriptions (synchronous)
en.action.imageEdit.label: AI Image Edit
en.action.imageEdit.description: Qwen/Wan image editing: style transfer, object add/remove, and local edits based on input images and text
en.action.wanTextToImageLegacy.label: Wan Text to Image (Legacy)
en.action.wanTextToImageLegacy.description: Wan 2.5 and earlier text-to-image (async, wan2.5/2.2/2.1 models)
en.action.imageOutPainting.label: AI Image Outpainting
en.action.imageOutPainting.description: Image outpainting: expand by ratio, direction, or aspect ratio. Supports rotation.
en.action.klingImageGeneration.label: Kling Image Generation
en.action.klingImageGeneration.description: Kling AI text-to-image or reference-image-to-image, supports single and series modes
en.action.imageToVideoV27.label: Wan Image to Video (2.7)
en.action.imageToVideoV27.description: Wan 2.7 image-to-video: supports first-frame, first-last-frame, video continuation, and audio-driven
en.action.imageToVideoLegacy.label: Wan Image to Video (Legacy)
en.action.imageToVideoLegacy.description: Wan 2.6 and earlier image-to-video models, generate video from first-frame image (wan2.6/2.5/2.2/2.1)
en.action.firstLastFrameVideo.label: First-Last Frame to Video
en.action.firstLastFrameVideo.description: Wan first-last-frame to video: generate smooth transition video from first and last frame images
en.action.referenceVideo.label: Reference to Video
en.action.referenceVideo.description: Wan 2.7 reference-to-video: generate video with a person or object as the main character, supports multi-character interaction
en.action.textToVideo.label: Wan Text to Video
en.action.textToVideo.description: Wan 2.7 text-to-video: generate video from text, supports multi-shot narrative and automatic dubbing
en.action.videoEditing.label: Wan Video Editing
en.action.videoEditing.description: Wan 2.7 video editing: supports instruction-based editing (style change) and reference-image editing (local replacement)
en.action.animateMove.label: Wan Animate Move
en.action.animateMove.description: Wan animate move: transfer actions and expressions from a reference video to a person image
en.action.videoretalk.label: VideoRetalk
en.action.videoretalk.description: VideoRetalk: generate lip-synced video from a person video and voice audio
en.action.uploadFile.label: Upload File (Bailian)
en.action.uploadFile.description: Upload local file to Aliyun Bailian temporary storage and get an oss:// URL (valid for 48 hours)
en.action.asrFileRecognition.label: Audio File Transcription
en.action.asrFileRecognition.description: Submit audio/video file URL for async speech recognition, supports FunASR/Paraformer/Qwen models, auto-polls for results
en.action.asrQwenFlash.label: Qwen Real-time ASR
en.action.asrQwenFlash.description: Qwen-ASR real-time speech recognition (synchronous), for short audio transcription with language detection and emotion analysis
en.field.apiKey.label: API Key
en.field.prompt.tooltip_image: Describe the image you want to generate
en.field.prompt.tooltip_edit: Describe the edit direction, e.g. "change background to seaside"
en.field.prompt.tooltip_reference_video: Use "image 1" "video 1" to refer to reference materials, describe the video content
en.field.prompt.tooltip_video_gen: Describe the video scene, shots, characters, etc. in detail
en.field.prompt.tooltip_edit_video: E.g. "convert to clay style" or "replace clothes with the reference image"
